evidence.snippet: Parker provides aerospace and defense customers with systems that enhance safety, efficiency and mission readiness across civil, military and unmanned platforms. Our flight controls, engine systems, hydraulics, fuel and thermal technologies perform in demanding environments. With global support and deep application knowledge, we help operators reduce downtime and meet evolving sustainability and performance needs.

items.notes: Parker has Military Flight Controls Division and Commercial Flight Controls Division; homepage explicitly states flight controls serve unmanned platforms.

headquarters.notes: No explicit headquarters city stated on the corpus pages. Contact phone on export compliance pages uses (216) area code, specific to Cleveland, Ohio.

evidence.snippet: Parker Hannifin is a Fortune 250 global leader in motion and control technologies. For more than a century the company has been enabling engineering breakthroughs that lead to a better tomorrow. Learn more at [www.parker.com](http://www.parker.com/) or [@parkerhannifin](https://twitter.com/parkerhannifin?lang=en).

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Parker Hannifin is a Fortune 250 global leader in motion and control technologies spanning aerospace, industrial, life sciences, and many more sectors. Unmanned platforms are one segment of their very broad aerospace & defense business.

evidence.snippet: Parker Hannifin is a Fortune 250 global leader in motion and control technologies. For more than a century the company has been enabling engineering breakthroughs that lead to a better tomorrow. Learn more at [www.parker.com](http://www.parker.com/) or [@parkerhannifin](https://twitter.com/parkerhannifin?lang=en).

As an experienced aerospace OEM solutions provider and trusted aerospace system integration partner, we work closely with leading aircraft industry companies to shape the future of aviation and defense—backed by comprehensive aftermarket support and a commitment to long-term customer success.

readiness.notes: Parker Hannifin is a Fortune 250 company with well-established serial production lines across all product categories serving commercial and military aerospace OEMs.

tagline: Broad industrial supplier of flight controls, actuation, hydraulics, filtration, and thermal management for aerospace platforms including unmanned systems. Produces Ebrake® braking technology and PAC-series flight control components in production. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status not publicly confirmed; limited public evidence of current unmanned-vehicle contracts or programs.
